description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run three jobs in parallel: build-gcc-linux on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, build-clang-9-linux on ubuntu-18.04, and build-clang-10-osx on macos-10.15. For each job, check out the code, build with cmake and a specific compiler, and run tests.
